candidates.name: Frame sampling + smart dedup pipeline
candidates.description: moviepy frame extraction with configurable FPS + FAISS/OpenSearch similarity dedup. Portable pattern for local video processing.

candidates.name: Multi-granularity hierarchy (frame → shot → scene)
candidates.description: Three-level temporal decomposition. Each level has summaries, timestamps, metadata. Structures how video content is analyzed.

candidates.name: Toggleable per-frame ML feature extraction
candidates.description: Each ML feature independently enabled. Config-driven feature selection. Extensibility pattern for adding new capabilities.

candidates.name: FAISS local dedup (no cloud dependency)
candidates.description: Local vector similarity using FAISS instead of OpenSearch. Same dedup quality, no cloud dependency. Direct port candidate.

candidates.name: Subtitle-to-frame timestamp alignment
candidates.description: Map Transcribe subtitle segments to frame timestamps. Non-obvious engineering for multimodal analysis.

candidates.name: Evaluation Service prompt template system
candidates.description: Templates for moderation, summarization, IAB classification. Run arbitrary LLM prompts against extracted metadata.

candidates.name: OpenSearch dependency for similarity (anti-pattern)
candidates.description: FAISS alternative exists in same repo. Don't add search cluster for video dedup.

candidates.name: No tests (anti-pattern)
candidates.description: 52 Python files, 1 test. AWS reference architectures often skip tests. Don't follow this pattern.
